arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford opens door to Arsenal transfer as striker interest emerges
arts.sum: Manchester United forward Marcus Rashford has said that he is ready to move on from the club, amid speculation over his future. FL says : It remains to be seen if United would be willing to sell to a club they may see as one of their Premier League rivals, but if Arsenal do show an interest and are able to agree a deal, then it could be a clever piece of business.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Gunners plot bid for West Ham forward with star earmarked for sale
arts.sum: Arsenal are tempted to splash the cash to sign a new attacker in the January transfer window and are once again looking across London to West Ham for possible targets

arts.ttl: Arsenal receive Marcus Rashford boost after major Manchester United future claim
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has acknowledged it might be time to seek pastures new, amid rumours that Manchester United are prepared to entertain offers for him. At just 27-years-old, Rashford found himself omitted from United’s derby day squad chosen by new head coach Ruben Amorim - a decision made in light of his recent form.

arts.ttl: Why Arsenal's goals have dried up: How opponents wrecked their set-piece tricks and the damning statistics for misfiring forward line
arts.sum: Since the start of last season, Arsenal have scored 31 goals from set-pieces, not including penalties. That's the same number of goals in that time as Mohamed Salah has scored for Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Dusan Vlahovic to Arsenal: Gunners to give 'go-ahead' to 'super exchange' including £45m player?
arts.sum: Arsenal could reportedly be open to negotiating a swap deal in order to sign Juventus striker Dusan Vlahovic in the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta hints at surprise new role for Arsenal star - 'A tremendous ability'
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has suggested that Ethan Nwaneri could eventually be used as a centre-forward amid Arsenal's continued struggles to score enough goals from open play

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta makes priority clear with admission on Arsenal star who 'isn't delivering'
arts.sum: Arsenal face Crystal Palace in the Carabao Cup on Wednesday night with Mikel Arteta calling on his players to take the competition as seriously as possible

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace boss ready to go full strength as he prepares for first part of Arsenal double-header
arts.sum: He said: “It would be a bit different when we also have European games because then you play every third day for a long period, but we’ve had last week to rest and to prepare [for this busy week]. Of course, this is only the second day after a game and 40 hours after the final whistle at Brighton.

arts.ttl: Glasner on Cup selection dilemmas & countering Arsenal strengths
arts.sum: Oliver Glasner is happy to have selection dilemmas ahead of Wednesday’s Carabao Cup quarter-final against Arsenal at Emirates Stadium.

arts.ttl: Star warned against Arsenal or Liverpool move, could be worth £200m in the future
